key_elements: Circular pulsing indicator using scaleEffect animation

patterns_discovered.description: Timer.scheduledTimer(withTimeInterval: 2.0, repeats: true) scheduled in onAppear, invalidated in onDisappear
patterns_discovered.use_case: Polling log files at fixed intervals without blocking UI
Continuous pulsing indicator without explicit state updates

patterns_discovered.description: Data(contentsOf:) with String encoding in refreshLogs() method
patterns_discovered.use_case: Direct file access from local URL without async/await

patterns_discovered.description: Array(allLines.suffix(maxLines)) to keep only last N lines
patterns_discovered.use_case: Memory-efficient log display with fixed window

gotchas_discovered.issue: Timer stored in @State and must be invalidated in onDisappear to prevent memory leaks and background execution

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Synchronous file I/O blocks SwiftUI thread
gotchas_discovered.issue: Data(contentsOf:) call in refreshLogs() is blocking; large log files will freeze UI during refresh
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Currently unmitigated; acceptable if log files remain small

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Empty string handling in line splitting
gotchas_discovered.issue: components(separatedBy: .newlines) may create empty strings at boundaries, stored in logLines without filtering
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Visual impact minimal; empty lines render as blank

gotchas_discovered.issue: Animation modifier .repeatForever is set in view body, but pulseScale initial state is not set; startPulse() manually sets to 1.3
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Works as intended; animation loop begins immediately on view appearance

approach_details.implementation_strategy: Component-based SwiftUI view with local state management
requirements_met: Last 30 lines display: ✓ maxLines = 30, using Array.suffix()
Pulsing indicator: ✓ Circle with scaleEffect animation
approach_details.code_quality: Well-structured with clear separation of concerns (refresh logic, animation, lifecycle)
approach_details.integration_readiness: Component is isolated and ready to embed in parent views

recommendations.recommendation: Move file I/O to async/await pattern using Task to prevent UI blocking on large log files
Add error handling for missing log files instead of silent failure
recommendations.example: Catch FileManager errors and display user-friendly message in logLines

recommendations.recommendation: Implement debouncing or coalescing of refresh events if log files are updated more frequently than 2-second interval
recommendations.example: Add lastRefreshTime tracking to skip redundant reads

recommendations.recommendation: Initialize pulseScale to 1.0 explicitly at declaration and remove manual startPulse() call
recommendations.example: @State private var pulseScale: CGFloat = 1.0 with animation triggered by onAppear directly

recommendations.recommendation: Add visual indicator when log file is empty vs. when logs haven't loaded yet
recommendations.example: Separate @State for loadingState to distinguish 'fetching' from 'no logs'
